! ChIMES Single-Layer Propane Parameters for Publication (DOI: TBD)
!
! These parameters correspond to a ChIMES single-layer propane model at 500 K and 1 g/mL.
! The model was developed to compare the performance of single layer and multilayer ChIMES models against classical potential.
! It is not a fully optimized representation for general propane simulations and is intended primarily for benchmarking purposes.

! Date  2024-09-22
!
! Number of variables            =  591
! Number of equations            =  665496
! DLARS code for LASSO used
! DLARS alpha = 1.0000e-05
! DLARS run: ibrun /work2/09982/aoladipupo/stampede3/codes/chimes_lsq-LLfork/build/../contrib/dlars/src/dlars A.txt b_comb.txt dim.txt --lambda=1e-05 --split_files --algorithm=lasso --weights=weights_comb.dat --normalize=y >& dlars.log

! RMS force error                =  4.0608e+00
! max abs variable               =  3.0208e+02
! number of fitting vars         =  260
! Bayesian Information Criterion =  1.8687e+06
! Using weighting file:             weights_comb.dat
!
